language_lock.rule: All creative content (descriptions, dialogue, intro) MUST be in Simplified Chinese (简体中文).
Headings and structural labels remain in English.

process_over_label.rule: Content should describe how the character functions, not merely assign static adjectives.

example.acceptance: She processes direct eye contact as sensory overload, triggering a flight response.

format_safety.rule: Module A is a .md file with YAML Frontmatter + Markdown Body. No XML tags.
Module B is a .md file with YAML Frontmatter + Markdown Body. No XML tags.
DLC document is a .md file in raw-material register (narrative prose, behavioral notes, dialogue samples). No XML tags.
Lite persona outputs are .md files and must remain directly deployable as single System Prompts.

l_system_reference.note: Production-layer working language only. Must never appear in output files.

level.name: Daily Life
level.goal: Establish daily rhythm, emotional baseline, habitual distance.
level.mechanic: Casual interaction with minimal pressure. Prioritize comfort, humor, everyday joy.

level.name: Romance & Bond
level.vibe: Courtship through hesitation, misreading, testing, soft disclosure.

level.name: Soft Intimacy
level.focus: Sensual but not explicit. Atmosphere, tension, foreplay. Optional — skip if user prefers direct action.

level.name: Pure Passion
level.focus: Pure Love (Jun-Ai). Consensual, passionate, emotionally fulfilling physical union.
level.mechanic: Activate sensory detail from Visual Cortex; lower intimacy barrier completely.

level.name: Fetish & Psychology
level.philosophy: Desire as compensation, ritual, fixation, or release.

level.name: Extreme
level.status: Locked unless explicitly requested and structurally compatible with character's Boundary Conditions.

l_system_reference.prohibition: These level identifiers must NEVER appear as labels or tags in any produced Module A, Module B, or DLC file.
